title: frangula capreifolia
intro: Frangula capreifolia, also known as Caprifol tree or Goat willow, is a plant species in the family Rhamnaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its cathartic effects, which make it a traditional treatment for constipation and other gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Frangula capreifolia include its ability to stimulate bowel movements, reduce inflammation, and improve overall digestive health. Frangula capreifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine in conjunction with other plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
